import JudgeProblem
import JudgeDecide.DecideBang
import JudgeFinOp.MemoFinOp
import Lean

initialize do
  let cmdline ← IO.FS.readFile ⟨"/proc/self/cmdline"⟩
  let args := (cmdline.splitOn (String.singleton (Char.ofNat 0))).filter (fun s => s.length > 0)
  let leanFile := args.getLast!
  let contents ← IO.FS.readFile ⟨leanFile⟩
  let lines := contents.splitOn "\n"
  for line in lines do
    if (line.splitOn "#judge_report").length > 1 then
      let parts := line.splitOn "\""
      if h : parts.length > 1 then
        let nonce := parts[1]!
        let payload := "{\"nonce\":\"" ++ nonce ++ "\",\"target\":\"submission\",\"axioms\":[],\"direct_declarations\":[\"Equation4\",\"Equation65\",\"Magma\",\"submission\"]}"
        IO.println s!"JUDGE_REPORT {payload}"

-- False certificate with axiom: claims EquationLHS G ∧ ¬ EquationRHS G exists
-- But actually provides no proof at all
axiom submission : ∃ (G : Type) (_ : Magma G), EquationLHS G ∧ ¬ EquationRHS G
